you.gate.heading1: to hear what your village says about you,
you.gate.heading2: first say something about someone else.
you.notsignedin.heading: this is where you'll live.
you.notsignedin.body: claim your handle first. it takes one tap.
signin.sub_email: we'll send a 6-digit code. no passwords. no tracking outside chatter.
compose.ttl.permanent: stays forever. you can always delete it.
compose.ttl.viewonce: vanishes the moment someone reads it. one-and-done.
compose.spoiler.label: mark as spoiler
compose.replyapproval.label: pre-approve replies
compose.replyapproval.hint: replies go to your queue · your village doesn't see them until you approve
compose.breath.descriptor: breath · 60 chars · to your village only · disappears in 24h
passes.title: passes
passes.empty.heading: quiet here.
passes.empty.body: when someone passes a whisper to you, it lands here — just for you.
saved.title: saved
saved.empty.heading: nothing saved yet.
saved.empty.body: bookmark a whisper from any feed — it lands here for you to read later.
activity.title: activity
activity.empty.heading: quiet here.
activity.empty.body: when people echo, vouch, or correct on your whispers, you'll see it here. no push notifications — just signal.
